title: athyrium patens
intro: Athyrium patens, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as a tea or powder for use in herbal remedies, and is often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and skin irritations.
